description.unified: Deals damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [5 sec->2sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for [30 sec->15 sec], dealing M.DMG every 1 sec and reducing M.DEF by [(added) 10%]. If recast within 15 sec, the [M.DEF reduction increases by 50% and stacks up to 5 times->M.DMG taken increases by 25%, increasing by 20% upon every use up to 5 stacks]. The [M.DEF reduction increase->M.DMG boost] effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals M.DMG every 1 sec to all enemies for [15 sec->22 sec], and recovers HP equal to [100%->50%] of damage dealt. During the duration, [reduces M.DMG taken by 11% for 4 allies with the lowest M.DEF->gains immunity to CC], and deals additional M.DMG to enemies inflicted with [Mark of Death] [(removed) and inflicts Stun with a 10% chance].

Increases M.DEF of [all allies->the ally with the lowest M.DEF] by [(added) 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))]. When taking fatal damage, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring [ATK + 6% Max HP->197*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 153.7% ATK + 10% Max HP]. [Coffin]: Unaffected by ATK Spd changes, becomes immune to all damage, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1 sec.

light.unified: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt.

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1 additional Mana Cost->2000], but pulls the target toward you.

light.unified: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by [250%->500%].

dark.unified: All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG.
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [2 sec->1 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target's CC Resist by [250->320] and [M.Block->Magic Block chance] by {0} for [10 sec->4 sec].
[Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to [8->16] times.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.DEF by [5%->3%] for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

[Rest in Peace] [Sets cooldown to 45 sec, and after activation, reduces M.DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec->dispels all negative effects from all allies and reduces All DMG dealt on self by {0}% for 10 sec].

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and [Recovery Rate->Healing] increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to [50->35] times.

description.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK every sec to nearby enemies, reduces their ATK by {1}%, and [recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt->increases DMG dealt against Non-Hero enemies of the ally with the highest ATK excluding self by {2}% and recovers 30% Mana when Passive triggers].

Summons the soul of Unchanging Mind, Erekura for 10sec, increasing own Heal Rate by [50%->27%]. Every 0.5sec, [reduces M.DEF of all enemies by 3%->increases M.DMG all enemies take by 10%] for 5sec. This effect stacks up to 5 times. After 10sec, consumes stacks on the target to deal M.DMG per stack.

2.from: Changes M.DMG Boost per stack to 20%.
2.to: Changes M.DEF reduction per stack to 20%.
2.unified: Changes [M.DMG Boost->M.DEF reduction] per stack to 20%.
